page.title: Mangusta 80 vs Pershing 46: Cost Comparison for Marbella Charters

data.meta_description: Compare Mangusta 80 vs Pershing 46 charter costs in Marbella. See €4,719 for 4h on Mangusta 80 vs Pershing 46 pricing on request. Book your day now.
data.summary: A direct cost comparison between the Mangusta 80 and Pershing 46 for Marbella charters, highlighting the Mangusta 80's fixed €4,719 minimum 4h rate (with free jet ski) and the Pershing 46's custom pricing. Includes key specs, inclusions, and booking advice.
key_facts: Mangusta 80 (24m, 12 pax) costs €4,719 minimum 4h (includes free jet ski).
Pershing 46 (14m, 10 pax) pricing on request via WhatsApp.
Both depart from Puerto Banús, Marbella.
All charters include skipper, fuel, drinks, snacks, insurance, and 21% IVA.
Mangusta 80 is nearly double the length of Pershing 46.
Pershing 46 suits smaller groups seeking a sporty, fast ride.
Mangusta 80 offers more deck space and luxury amenities.

faq.q: What is the minimum cost to charter the Mangusta 80 in Marbella?
faq.a: The Mangusta 80 starts at €4,719 for a minimum of 4 hours. This includes a licensed skipper, fuel, drinks, snacks, insurance, and a free jet ski. The price is fixed and covers up to 12 passengers.

faq.q: How much does it cost to charter the Pershing 46 in Marbella?
faq.a: Pricing for the Pershing 46 is on request. You can contact us via WhatsApp for a custom quote based on your preferred duration and date. The charter includes all standard inclusions: skipper, fuel, drinks, snacks, and insurance.

faq.q: Which boat is better for a large group in Marbella?
faq.a: The Mangusta 80 is better for larger groups, accommodating up to 12 passengers with its 24m length, spacious decks, and luxury amenities. The Pershing 46 holds up to 10 passengers in a more compact, sporty 14m design.

faq.q: Does the Mangusta 80 charter price include a jet ski?
faq.a: Yes, every Mangusta 80 charter includes a free jet ski for the duration of your rental. This adds significant value, especially for families or groups wanting water sports during their day on the sea.

faq.q: Can I negotiate the price for the Pershing 46 charter?
faq.a: All pricing for the Pershing 46 is customised per booking. Simply message us on WhatsApp with your preferred date and hours, and we'll provide a competitive quote. Prices are transparent and include all standard inclusions.

faq.q: What is the top speed of the Pershing 46 compared to the Mangusta 80?
faq.a: The Pershing 46 is known for its sporty performance, achieving speeds around 35-40 knots, ideal for a fast, thrilling ride. The Mangusta 80 cruises at a more relaxed 25-30 knots, prioritising comfort and luxury over speed.

faq.q: Where do these charters depart from in Marbella?
faq.a: Both the Mangusta 80 and Pershing 46 depart from Puerto Banús, Marbella's premier marina. You'll meet your skipper at the port, and the boat will be ready for your group. We can also arrange pick-ups from other Marbella marinas on request.

faq.q: Which boat offers better value for money in Marbella?
faq.a: The Mangusta 80 offers clear fixed pricing at €4,719 for 4h, including a jet ski—great value for groups of 12. The Pershing 46, with its custom pricing, may suit smaller groups seeking a faster, more intimate experience. Both provide excellent value given their inclusions.

data.body_html:
Choosing between a Mangusta 80 vs Pershing 46 for your Marbella charter comes down to budget, group size, and experience. The Mangusta 80 offers a fixed €4,719 minimum 4h rate (including a free jet ski), while the Pershing 46 is priced on request. Both depart from Puerto Banús and include skipper, fuel, drinks, and insurance. Here's a direct cost breakdown to help you decide.

Mangusta 80 vs Pershing 46: Key Specs at a Glance

The Mangusta 80 is a 24-metre luxury yacht with capacity for 12 guests, while the Pershing 46 is a 14-metre sport cruiser holding up to 10. The Mangusta 80 offers more deck space and a flybridge, whereas the Pershing 46 is built for speed and agility. Both boats are based in Puerto Banús and come with a licensed skipper, fuel, and a full drinks and snacks package.

Mangusta 80 Charter Cost in Marbella

The Mangusta 80 has a fixed price of €4,719 for a minimum of 4 hours. This includes a free jet ski, making it a strong choice for water sports enthusiasts. The rate covers up to 12 passengers, with all standard inclusions: skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, and 21% IVA. No hidden extras.

Pershing 46 Charter Cost in Marbella

Pricing for the Pershing 46 is on request via WhatsApp. You can contact us for a custom quote based on your preferred duration and date. The charter includes the same standard package as all our boats: licensed skipper, fuel, drinks, snacks, insurance, and tax. The Pershing 46 is ideal for smaller groups wanting a sporty, fast ride along the Costa del Sol.

Cost Comparison Table: Mangusta 80 vs Pershing 46

FeatureMangusta 80Pershing 46
Length24m14m
Max passengers1210
Minimum cost€4,719 (4h)On request
Free jet skiYesNo
InclusionsSkipper, fuel, drinks, snacks, insurance, IVASkipper, fuel, drinks, snacks, insurance, IVA
DeparturePuerto BanúsPuerto Banús

Which Boat Offers Better Value for Your Marbella Charter?

For groups of 10–12, the Mangusta 80 provides clear, fixed pricing with the added perk of a jet ski, making it excellent value. For smaller groups of up to 10 who prioritise speed and a more intimate setting, the Pershing 46 is a flexible option with custom pricing. Both boats offer the same high-quality inclusions, so your choice depends on budget and group size. Explore our full fleet of Marbella charter boats to compare other options.

Where You'll Cruise: Marbella to Cabopino and Beyond

Both yachts depart from Puerto Banús, giving you direct access to the best cruising spots on the Costa del Sol. Popular routes include heading west to Cabopino or east to Cala del Faro and Cala Cortés. You can also anchor near the Golden Mile or head to Estepona for a longer day. The Mangusta 80's larger deck makes it perfect for sunbathing and socialising, while the Pershing 46 is great for a fast trip to Sotogrande.

How to Book Your Mangusta 80 or Pershing 46 Charter

Booking is simple. For the Mangusta 80, you can reserve directly online or via WhatsApp with the fixed 4h rate. For the Pershing 46, contact us via WhatsApp for a personalised quote. Both include all standard inclusions, so you won't face surprise costs. Check availability for your preferred date and let us arrange your day on the water.

Frequently asked questions

What is the minimum cost to charter the Mangusta 80 in Marbella?

The Mangusta 80 starts at €4,719 for a minimum of 4 hours. This includes a licensed skipper, fuel, drinks, snacks, insurance, and a free jet ski. The price is fixed and covers up to 12 passengers.

How much does it cost to charter the Pershing 46 in Marbella?

Pricing for the Pershing 46 is on request. You can contact us via WhatsApp for a custom quote based on your preferred duration and date. The charter includes all standard inclusions: skipper, fuel, drinks, snacks, and insurance.

Which boat is better for a large group in Marbella?

The Mangusta 80 is better for larger groups, accommodating up to 12 passengers with its 24m length, spacious decks, and luxury amenities. The Pershing 46 holds up to 10 passengers in a more compact, sporty 14m design.

Does the Mangusta 80 charter price include a jet ski?

Yes, every Mangusta 80 charter includes a free jet ski for the duration of your rental. This adds significant value, especially for families or groups wanting water sports during their day on the sea.

Can I negotiate the price for the Pershing 46 charter?

All pricing for the Pershing 46 is customised per booking. Simply message us on WhatsApp with your preferred date and hours, and we'll provide a competitive quote. Prices are transparent and include all standard inclusions.

What is the top speed of the Pershing 46 compared to the Mangusta 80?

The Pershing 46 is known for its sporty performance, achieving speeds around 35-40 knots, ideal for a fast, thrilling ride. The Mangusta 80 cruises at a more relaxed 25-30 knots, prioritising comfort and luxury over speed.

Where do these charters depart from in Marbella?

Both the Mangusta 80 and Pershing 46 depart from Puerto Banús, Marbella's premier marina. You'll meet your skipper at the port, and the boat will be ready for your group. We can also arrange pick-ups from other Marbella marinas on request.

Which boat offers better value for money in Marbella?

The Mangusta 80 offers clear fixed pricing at €4,719 for 4h, including a jet ski—great value for groups of 12. The Pershing 46, with its custom pricing, may suit smaller groups seeking a faster, more intimate experience. Both provide excellent value given their inclusions.
